title: senecio citriceps
intro: Senecio citriceps, also known as Yellow Bells or Butterbells, is a flowering plant native to South Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its hepatoprotective and anti-inflammatory compounds that can help protect the liver and reduce inflammation in the body. The health benefits of Senecio citriceps include its ability to improve liver function, reduce oxidative stress, and act as an antioxidant, which can contribute to overall well-being and potentially alleviate symptoms of liver diseases. In herbal preparations, Senecio citriceps is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, where its bioactive compounds are extracted to provide its medicinal benefits.
